wins_analysis: No wins today as zero recommendations were generated. The system produced no trades, so there are no successful setups to analyze.
losses_analysis: No losses today since no trades were placed. The core failure is that the AI model was unavailable and the zone score fallback system failed to generate any actionable setups, resulting in a completely idle day during a strong trending market.
regime_impact: Today's strong downtrend (Nifty -2.1%, ADX 25) presented excellent SHORT opportunities at supply zones that went completely unexploited. A trending_down regime with ADX≥25 is ideal for supply zone shorts, but the system's fallback mode was too restrictive or broken to capitalize.

improvements.action: Fix the zone score fallback to generate at least 3-5 SHORT recommendations when AI is unavailable and regime is trending_down with ADX≥22. Lower the minimum zone score threshold from current level to 65 for supply zones aligned with trend direction.
improvements.reason: Zero setups on a -2.1% trending day with ADX 25 is unacceptable — strong trends are the highest-probability environments and the fallback completely failed to identify any supply zone shorts.

improvements.action: Implement a regime-based bias filter: when trending_down, only scan supply zones (SHORT setups) and skip demand zones entirely. Set minimum 5 SHORT candidates from top liquid Nifty 50 names showing breakdown patterns.
improvements.reason: In a -2.1% session, demand zones are likely to fail. Aligning scan direction with regime would have surfaced high-probability short entries at pre-identified supply levels.

improvements.action: Add a manual override or watchlist of 5 high-beta stocks (TATAMOTORS, ADANIENT, BAJFINANCE, HINDALCO, TATASTEEL) with pre-computed supply zones that auto-activate SHORT pending orders when VIX>15 and Nifty gap-down >0.5%.
improvements.reason: High-beta stocks move 1.5-2x Nifty in trends — on a -2.1% day these would have offered 3-4% moves. Having pre-set levels ensures trades even when AI is offline.

improvements.action: Set entry timing for SHORT setups to place limit orders at supply zones within the first 30 minutes (9:15-9:45) on gap-down opens, as pullbacks to supply in the opening range are the highest R:R entries in downtrends.
improvements.reason: Strong trend days often gap and then give one pullback to a nearby supply zone in the first 30 min before continuation. Missing this window means missing the trade entirely.

improvements.action: Add a system health check at 9:00 AM that alerts if AI is unavailable AND fallback produces zero setups — trigger an emergency scan using simple technical rules (e.g., stocks below 20 EMA breaking previous day low with volume) to ensure non-zero output.
improvements.reason: A full day with zero activity during a high-opportunity regime represents a system failure, not a market failure. A safety net scan ensures some participation.

tomorrow_focus: Watch for continuation of downtrend — if Nifty opens flat or with weak bounce, aggressively short supply zones on high-beta names; if VIX spikes above 18, tighten targets to 1.5:1 R:R as volatility expands.

symbol_notes.TATAMOTORS.NS: High-beta stock likely hit supply zones today during selloff — identify fresh supply at today's breakdown levels for SHORT tomorrow
symbol_notes.ADANIENT.NS: Volatile name that trends hard — look for supply zone near today's opening range high for SHORT entry
symbol_notes.BAJFINANCE.NS: Financial sector weakness in downtrends — mark supply zones from today's intraday pullback highs
symbol_notes.HDFCBANK.NS: Heavyweight likely dragged index — if it holds below today's VWAP at open, short toward next demand zone
